description: The user-facing first-run command. Runs the §8.4 17-step flow: banner, version checks, Ollama detection / install, model detection / pull, optional CLI inventory, profile install (opt-in), config + policy creation, preflight, success panel. Idempotent — safe to re-run after partial setup.
notes: Preserve existing config on re-run; only write defaults when missing. Backup any existing config before overwrite even on partial migrations.
steps: TDD: Fresh machine: full flow with all confirmations granted writes config + policy and runs preflight.
TDD: Re-run on a configured machine: idempotent — no duplicate writes, no duplicate profile blocks.
TDD: Each step's success / failure is reflected in a final structured result.
name: [set-05] Initialize-SlashOps full flow
